summary: Completed comprehensive testing of structured memory architecture refactoring. All 13 features from the test specification have been validated successfully. TypeScript compilation passes for new memory files, and all unit-level logic validation tests pass.

minor_issues.issue: Contains stale comment reference to old saveUserMemories() function
minor_issues.impact: Documentation only - file is not used anywhere in the codebase

passed_tests: types/memory.ts exports MemoryFact and UserMemoryStore interfaces correctly with all required fields
lib/kv-memory.ts - getUserMemoryStore returns empty store when KV is empty or corrupt JSON
lib/kv-memory.ts - saveUserMemoryStore sanitizes facts, caps at 50, and persists JSON
lib/kv-memory.ts - getRelevantFacts scores facts by tag match + accessCount bonus, returns top N, increments accessCount
lib/kv-memory.ts - getRelevantFacts falls back to 3 most recent facts when no tags match
lib/kv-memory.ts - formatFactsForPrompt outputs [MEMORY START]/[MEMORY END] block or empty string
lib/memory-extractor.ts - extractMemoryFacts calls Gemini Flash, parses JSON response, merges with existing facts
lib/memory-extractor.ts - extractMemoryFacts deduplicates via includes(), caps at 50
lib/memory-extractor.ts - extractMemoryFacts handles parse failures gracefully (returns existing facts)
app/api/memory/route.ts POST increments interactionCount, calls extractMemoryFacts only every 5th interaction
app/api/memory/route.ts GET returns full UserMemoryStore JSON
app/api/chat/route.ts uses getUserMemoryStore + getRelevantFacts + formatFactsForPrompt instead of old getUserMemories
No references to old getUserMemories or saveUserMemories functions remain in route files
TypeScript compilation succeeds for all changed files (waitlist page error is pre-existing)
Memory sanitizer integration works correctly in saveUserMemoryStore
Gemini stream integration passes memories parameter to buildGeminiRequest
All scoring logic, fallback logic, and access count increment logic implemented correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Implementation is complete and working correctly. Optional: Remove unused /app/services/memory.service.ts file as it contains stale references and is not used anywhere.
